diagrams.title: Basic Graphics System Architecture
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing CPU connected to GPU, which connects to frame buffer and display controller, finally to monitor
diagrams.purpose: Understanding data flow from application to display

diagrams.title: CRT Display Structure
diagrams.description: Cross-section of CRT showing electron gun, focusing system, deflection coils, and phosphorescent screen
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CRT displays create images using electron beams

diagrams.title: Graphics Pipeline
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing sequential stages from application to frame buffer output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how 3D scenes are converted to 2D display images

diagrams.title: Raster Scan Pattern
diagrams.description: Diagram showing electron beam path scanning horizontally from left to right, moving down row by row
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how raster displays draw images pixel by pixel
